features: Regular daily use of this with its pH balanced formulation
Perfect for natural protection from irritation
Specially formulated to give long-lasting freshness
description: Product Description Beauty Formulas feminine Deodorizing intimate cleansing Wash is cleaner free of soap with control of odor, has been specially formulated to give freshness lasting. Their use daily and its formula with pH balanced, is ideal for the protection natural against the irritations. The balance of the pH of the vaginal area may alter due to several factors such as soap, bath products, stress, periods and changes in lifestyle. Ingredients Aqua (Water), Sodium Laureth Sulfate, Cocamidopropyl Betaine, Lactic Acid, Glycerin, PEG-7 Glyceryl Cocoate, Sodium Chloride, Phenoxyethanol, Ethylhexylglycerin, Parfum (Fragrance). Directions Use Within Recommended Period – Check jar symbol on package for months of use after opening. See more
